description: Nuestra Familia is a Mexican-American prison gang originating in Northern California, founded in 1965 at the Soledad Correctional Training Facility. It controls drug trafficking, extortion, and other organized crime both inside and outside prisons, and is considered the leadership for the Norteños street gang. The gang is a long-standing rival of the Mexican Mafia (La Eme).

country_links.evidence_quote: Territorio: Norte de California , Estado de Washington , Oregón , Idaho , Nevada , Utah , Kansas , Georgia , Florida , Diferentes sistema de Penitenciarios en California
country_links.context: The organization has territory in multiple U.S. states including California, Washington, Oregon, Idaho, Nevada, Utah, Kansas, Georgia, and Florida.
